title: Continuum Kit
audience: Smart outsiders who are curious about AI-assisted work, but are not inside Peter's private project context.
defaultTakeaway: The reader should leave with one clear idea they can use in their own work.
defaultTone: Honest, concrete, warm, non-corporate, thoughtful, and allergic to hype.
recurringThemes: small coherent product surfaces beat feature sprawl
private messy work can become clean public artifacts

seoDefaults.titleStyle: Specific claim or useful phrase, not a vague announcement.
seoDefaults.metaDescriptionStyle: One concrete sentence about the post's useful idea.
seoDefaults.imageAltTextStyle: Plain description of the actual image, no keyword stuffing.

sensitivityRules: Do not publish raw private logs.
Do not publish personal source captures unless explicitly approved.
Do not imply security, automation, or publishing systems are production-ready unless verified.
Mark speculative product ideas as speculative.
publishChecklist: Tags and description fit the site.
